name: Papua New Guinea Address Data

hierarchy.label: Region
hierarchy.code_system_note: Package grouping used by PNG map/address package.

hierarchy.label: Province
hierarchy.code_system_note: Province codes use ISO 3166-2:PG where supplied by source shapeISO.

hierarchy.label: District
hierarchy.code_system_note: Generated package codes when source has no official code field.

hierarchy.label: Local-level government
hierarchy.code_system_note: Generated package codes when source has no official code field.

hierarchy.label: Ward
hierarchy.code_system_note: Official PNG hierarchy includes wards below LLG. Supplemental text ward records may exist even when ward boundary geometry is unavailable.

hierarchy.label: Census unit
hierarchy.code_system_note: Used for census purposes below ward; not included in the current source data.

supplemental_sources.name: papua-new-guinea-geolist
supplemental_sources.usage: Supplemental text-only ward names for address autocomplete. No geometry.

notes: Province codes use ISO 3166-2:PG where available.
District, LLG, and supplemental ward codes may be generated package codes when no official source code is available.
Ward records are address/search records only unless geometry_available is true.
